name: Third party like equipment supplier liable for my lung injury?
description: Yes, sue for negligence beyond comp.

mainEntity.name: Third party like equipment supplier liable for my lung injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue for negligence beyond comp.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if their negligence contributed, sue separately for full damages.**

Beyond comp, personal injury against contractors/ makers for faulty gear[2][1]. Unlimited pain/suffering.

- Prove defect or protocol failure.
- Independent from comp.
- Higher payouts possible.

Lawyer evaluates liability; dual claims common. More compensation avenue[2].
